pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Java source and target version to 21 to align with the new JDK baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce bytecode incompatible with JDK 21 if the source/target version remains at 17.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot to version 3.2.4 to ensure compatibility with JDK 21 and access new features.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.0.x may lack full JDK 21 support or critical bug fixes required for the new runtime environment.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler plugin to 3.11.0 to ensure proper support for JDK 21 language features.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older compiler plugins may not correctly handle JDK 21 syntax or bytecode generation.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven Surefire plugin to 3.2.1 to ensure test execution compatibility with JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Surefire versions may fail to launch or execute tests on JDK 21 due to internal API changes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven Failsafe plugin to 3.2.1 to ensure integration test execution compatibility with JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Failsafe versions may fail to launch or execute integration tests on JDK 21.

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.general_idea: Update the base Docker image to use a JDK 21 runtime instead of JDK 17.
src/main/docker/Dockerfile.why_exists: The application code has been migrated to JDK 21, so the runtime environment must match to execute the compiled bytecode.

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.general_idea: Switch the default garbage collector to ZGC with generational support, which is a feature available in JDK 21.
src/main/docker/Dockerfile.why_exists: ZGC with generational support (-XX:+ZGenerational) is not available or stable in JDK 17; using it would cause startup failure or require different flags.

src/main/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.general_idea: Add a default value to the numeric configuration property binding to prevent startup failures if the property is missing.
src/main/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.why_exists: Spring Boot throws a BeanCreationException at startup if a required @Value property is not found in the environment and no default is specified.
